entries.name: Persian Hidden Words — Preamble
entries.text: Ilo Etan Iroij in Konono, Eo Ekajur potata.

entries.name: Arabic Hidden Words — Preamble
entries.text:
E Aibuijuij ion Aibuijuij otemjij

Enin ej men eo emoj an wonlaltak jen ailin in Aibuijuij, konono kin loon kajur im maron, eo emoj kar kwalok nan Dri kannan ro mokta. Emoj Amw bok melele ko remwilal jene im kanuknuk kin balin ekadru, einwot juon menin lelok nan ro dri wenik, bwe ren maron jutak bin ilo Bujen eo an Anij, maron mour ekkar nan Ankilan, im ilo ailin eo an Jitob ren bok dreka aurok an mour in ailin in Lan.
